ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical condition */,
  "clinical_status" TEXT /* Current clinical status of the condition */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status indicating if the condition is confirmed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., problem-list-item) */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition started */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_clinical_status FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_status") REFERENCES clinical_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_verification_status FOREIGN KEY ("verification_status") REFERENCES verification_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., physician, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or specialty of the user (e.g., cardiology, oncology) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or certification information of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_hierarchy" TEXT /* Category hierarchy (e.g., parent-child relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the verification status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the verification status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Status code for the verification status (e.g., C for confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Status code for the clinical status (e.g., A for active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition it belongs to */,
  "implicit_rules" TEXT /* Implicit rules applied during condition creation */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the resource content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the metadata */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Metadata version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition it applies to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the rule (e.g., validation, calculation, or decision support) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the condition */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address or device information */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of what was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* Old values before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition it represents */,
  "system" TEXT /* Coding system (e.g., SNOMED CT) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the condition */,
  "display" TEXT /* Display name for the code */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the coding system (e.g., SNOMED CT version) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_codes_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)
